'''Garang''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] located on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] during the [[Old Sith Wars]].<ref name="KOTOR" /> It was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] city<ref name="JATM">''[[Jedi Academy Training Manual]]''</ref> and main trading hub on Dantooine during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. The city evidently did not host a large population, as Dantooine was considered to have no urban center. Garang had some form of [[Garang municipal authorities|municipal authorities]], along with a [[Garang archives|database]] that archived business transactions and criminal records. It also boasted a [[Garang spaceport|spaceport]] to handle the planet's exportation of [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuffs]] and other products. The city, along with Dantooine itself, was aligned with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and worked closely with the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], who had an [[Jedi Enclave|enclave]] on the planet.<ref name="KOTOR" /> In [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]],'' including mentions of events in Garang, in [[3956 BBY]].</ref> it played host to at least one sub-orbital [[Transport/Legends|transport]] corporation and was, according to rumor, the base of operations of a local [[Unidentified Hutt (Dantooine)|unnamed Hutt]].<ref name="KOTOR" />
